coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Regular User — The Regular User should provide user profile with bio, avatar, followers/following lists, and activity feed.
task_titles: Implement user profile with bio, avatar, followers/following workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide post creation supporting text, images, and videos with tagging and hashtags.
task_titles: Implement creation supporting text, images, and videos creation workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide news feed algorithm based on follows, engagement, and recency scoring.
task_titles: Implement news feed algorithm based on follows workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide communities (groups) with public/private modes, membership management, and pinned posts.
task_titles: Implement communities (groups) with public/private modes, membership management, and pinned posts workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide direct messaging with read receipts and media sharing.
task_titles: Implement direct messaging with read receipts workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Content Creator — The Content Creator should provide content moderation: reporting, automated spam detection, and moderator review queue.
task_titles: Implement content moderation: reporting, automated spam detection workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide notification center: likes, comments, mentions, follows — real-time and digest email.
task_titles: Implement center: likes, comments, mentions, follows — real-time and digest email notification workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should meet p95 under 300ms response-time SLO.
The system should maintain responsive performance for concurrent users.
The system should be stored in geo-redundant object storage with 99.999% durability..

stage_summaries.headline: Stage 1 delivers core product workflows
titles: Implement user profile with bio, avatar, followers/following workflow
Implement creation supporting text, images, and videos creation workflow
Implement communities (groups) with public/private modes, membership management, and pinned posts workflow
Implement direct messaging with read receipts workflow

stage_summaries.headline: Stage 2 focuses on validation
titles: Implement news feed algorithm based on follows workflow
Implement content moderation: reporting, automated spam detection workflow

stage_summaries.headline: Stage 3 delivers user communications and alerting
titles: Implement center: likes, comments, mentions, follows — real-time and digest email notification workflow

risk_signals: Non-functional scope is substantial, so quality engineering should run in parallel with feature delivery.
3 high-complexity tasks sit on the roadmap and deserve early prototyping.
Some non-root workflow tasks are still structurally isolated and should be reviewed before scheduling.

committee_brief.domain_inference: Likely domain: social platform and content moderation.
committee_brief.scope_assessment: Scope includes 7 functional task(s) and 3 non-functional task(s); 0 task(s) sit outside the confirmed baseline because they are optional or low-confidence.
assumption_log: Dependency sequencing was inferred for 3 task(s) to produce an executable implementation order beyond the raw prose order.
committee_brief.confidence_signal: Planning confidence is high: no low-confidence tasks were detected in the current plan.
committee_brief.graph_summary: 10 requirements -> 10 atomic tasks across 3 delivery sprints. Critical delivery path: T004 -> T006 -> T007 (3 hops, ~6 story points, estimated 5 weeks with a 2-person team). Coordination hotspot: Optimize p95 under 300ms response-time SLO blocks 1 downstream tasks and should be closed by Sprint 1. Parallel execution opportunity: 7 tasks can start immediately in Sprint 1. Effort breakdown: 258 estimated hours | FR: 144h | NFR: 114h.
